news_angle: New US government AI clearinghouse launched to consolidate efforts from Treasury, Defense, Homeland Security and the White House.
why_this_is_news: The launch marks a coordinated federal effort to centralize AI development and oversight, reflecting strategic prioritization in the global AI race.
specific_action: officially launched on July 2 by Treasury, Defense, and Homeland Security in consultation with the White House
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a savvy street-smart cat DJ spinning AI data streams on futuristic turntables amid neon-lit cityscape, symbolizing the bustling convergence of government AI powers.
image_prompt: A charismatic orange tabby cat with sharp tabby markings and an athletic build, dressed in stylish tech-themed streetwear including a black hoodie and cap, spinning futuristic holographic turntables glowing with complex AI data streams. The background is a dynamic neon-lit futuristic cityscape with digital screens and holograms of AI symbols and government seals subtly integrated. The cat's eyes are large, expressive, full of mischievous confidence, and the cat wears a cool grin showing excitement and control over the AI technology.
easter_eggs: Subtle nods to US government symbols stylized as graffiti, tiny robotic mice dancing around the cat, and a hovering drone resembling a tiny AI assistant.
caption: The US government just kicked off its new AI clearinghouse, blending powers from major federal departments to lead the AI race. Hunk Mao’s ready on the decks, showing them how a clever cat governs the future of tech.
risk_notes: The topic is sensitive to political context; focus must remain on the AI initiative and avoid partisan bias or speculation.
